violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Rice was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025
Food Items were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
The hood system was observed with an excess of debris. Hood system must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2025
The bar is lacking a hand-washing sink. A handwashing sink must be installed at the bar. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025
The prep table located by the dish machine area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the the prep unit by the fry station. Gaskets must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the 2 door fridge in kitchen have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

The ceiling above the cooking line is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The ceiling tiles in the dining room were observed damaged. Ceiling tiles must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2025
The outside of the hood systems was observed with an excess of debris, the hood system must be maintained clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025
